hints.text: Drives on the **right**; plates white with black lettering (long or short)
**Vietnamese** = Latin script with **more diacritics than any other** on Street View; short, mostly single-syllable words
Common bollard = small **square concrete, painted white with a red top**
Road-sign posts painted **red-and-white striped**; road signs have a **yellow-orange background** (unique in SE Asia)
**Waystones** white w/ colourful (red/blue) top, road number + distances → great for pinpointing
Chevrons black/yellow or white/red (single arrow); direction signs blue, arrows often point in **odd directions**
Unusually **short yellow middle dashes** are distinctive; concrete-block minor roads common
A-type guardrails with reflectors **red on one side / yellow on the other**; red-white concrete barriers on mountain roads
Big pole variety: **holey poles** (also Sri Lanka), round indented poles, trapezoid poletops, grey electricity boxes w/ a sloped bottom
**Most motorcycle coverage in the world** — bone-shaped blur (sometimes just a helmet); rural motorcycle coverage ≈ Vietnam
**Addresses everywhere** (storefronts) → scan for the **province** (tỉnh / TP abbreviations); learn OLD provinces (2025 reform merged many)
**Mekong Delta** = ultra-flat, canals + linear villages, palms; **Red River Delta** flat fields (north); **Central Highlands** = red soil, hilly, rubber/tea/pepper
Area codes start with **2**, ordered north→south; plate region codes painted on trucks
